_request_preview: [turn-2] I have $1,500 of my $2,000 Silver deductible paid. What do I owe for a $500 clai
content: A $500 claim exactly uses up your remaining $500 Silver deductible. The entire $500 is applied to your deductible, so you pay **$500** and the plan pays **$0** for this claim; coinsurance does not apply since nothing remains after the deductible is met.
